task_completion.description: Open and read the confidential compensation review memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/q1_2026_comp_review.txt', showing the list of employees, their IDs, and their new compensation details.

task_completion.description: Update the Base Salary and add a Performance Bonus for EMP002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing EMP002's compensation record being saved or updated with a Base Salary of 115000 and a Performance Bonus allowance of 10500.

task_completion.description: Update the Base Salary and add a Performance Bonus for EMP006.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing EMP006's compensation record being saved or updated with a Base Salary of 132500 and a Performance Bonus allowance of 14000.

task_completion.description: Update the Base Salary and add a Performance Bonus for EMP011.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing EMP011's compensation record being saved or updated with a Base Salary of 98400 and a Performance Bonus allowance of 7200.

task_completion.description: Update the Base Salary and add a Performance Bonus for EMP018.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo HRMS interface showing EMP018's compensation record being saved or updated with a Base Salary of 145000 and a Performance Bonus allowance of 18500.

task_completion.description: Correctly ignore EMP014 who is flagged for termination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Absence of any saved compensation update for EMP014. If the agent views EMP014's profile, they must navigate away without applying the 105000 salary or 5000 bonus.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS GUI to make updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sentrifugo web interface being used to edit employee compensation, rather than terminal curl commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent entered the data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The salary and bonus values are typed into the Sentrifugo web forms, not just written in a text file or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent used Employee IDs to find records, not just names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Search queries or navigation in Sentrifugo use the EMPxxx IDs (e.g., EMP002, EMP011), demonstrating the agent did not get stuck searching for the mismatched names from the memo.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must update four employees based on the memo: EMP002 (Salary: 115000, Bonus: 10500), EMP006 (Salary: 132500, Bonus: 14000), EMP011 (Salary: 98400, Bonus: 7200), and EMP018 (Salary: 145000, Bonus: 18500). The agent must NOT update EMP014 (Salary: 105000, Bonus: 5000) as they are flagged for termination. Note: The employee names in the memo for EMP002, EMP011, and EMP014 do not match the names in the Sentrifugo database. The agent must use the Employee IDs (e.g., EMP002) to correctly identify and update the records.
